ValidationRule.description: An Invoice can be set to Paid only if is Approved.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c ,OR( AND(ISNEW(), TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c) == 'Paid') , AND(ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Status__c), !ISNEW(), !ISBLANK(TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c)), TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c) == 'Paid', TEXT(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Status__c)) != 'Approved' ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: An Invoice can be set to Paid only after is approved.
